name: BEST Lending Co
description_short: BEST Lending Co offers direct private loans for real estate investors, including fix-and-flip bridge loans, DSCR loans for rental properties, and construction financing with online closing.
description_long:
BEST Lending Co is a direct private lender specializing in short-term and long-term financing for real estate investors and developers. The company operates through an online platform and claims to have closed $250M in loan value with an 81.73% repeat client rate. Founded by an owner named Ben (according to client testimonials), the firm positions itself as a boutique lender serving the fix-and-flip, rental property, and construction development markets.

The company offers three primary loan products: Fix-N-Flip bridge loans (up to 90% of purchase price and 100% of rehab costs, rates starting at 9.50%, minimum 660 FICO), DSCR loans for long-term rentals and refinancing (up to 80% LTV, 30-year fixed, rates starting at 6.50%, allows short-term rentals), and Construction loans for ground-up and development projects (up to 85% LTC, rates starting at 9.99%, interest disbursed). All loan products can close in as little as 3-15 business days depending on type, with the fastest closings claimed at 3 days once a full package is received.

BEST Lending distinguishes itself through a fully digital application and closing process, proprietary technology for 100% online transactions, competitive rates compared to traditional lenders, willingness to approve deals other lenders reject, and testimonials emphasizing personalized service and quick decision-making. Multiple client reviews highlight the team's communication, knowledge of investment property loan structures, and ability to close quickly. The company also partners with industry professionals and maintains a "Project Spotlight" section featuring recent closed loans.

However, prospective borrowers should note that these are private lending products with rates significantly higher than conventional mortgages (6.50%-9.99%+ versus 3%-5% for traditional home loans), making them suitable only for short-term or investment-focused borrowing. The minimum FICO scores of 660+ and focus on real estate investors mean this lender serves a specialized market, not general consumers. While the website provides client testimonials and claims competitive terms, actual approval odds and closing speeds may vary based on loan complexity and documentation completeness.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Fully online application and closing process with eSignature capabilities and 100% digital document uploads
Extremely fast closing times: 3 days after full package receipt, with advertised closes as quick as 5-12 days depending on loan type
High LTV/LTC ratios: up to 90% on fix-and-flip purchases, 100% rehab financing, and 80% LTV on DSCR loans
Willing to fund deals other lenders reject (per client testimonials) and allows short-term rental properties under DSCR program
Consistent 5-star average client reviews with 81.73% repeat client rate demonstrating customer satisfaction
Transparent rate disclosure: published starting rates for each product (9.50% Fix-N-Flip, 6.50% DSCR, 9.99% Construction)
Real estate investor-focused underwriting: experienced team familiar with investment property deal structures and pro forma analysis
cons: Private lending rates (6.50%-9.99%+) are substantially higher than conventional mortgages (typically 3%-5%), making long-term financing expensive
Minimum 660 FICO score requirement excludes borrowers with credit challenges; no mention of credit flexibility or repair options
Limited to real estate investors and developers; not suitable for primary residence home purchases or consumer lending needs
Website does not disclose origination fees, closing costs, prepayment penalties, or other cost details that would impact true APR calculation
All testimonials appear to be cherry-picked success stories; no independent third-party reviews, complaints database references, or licensing verification provided
best_for: Real estate investors seeking short-term bridge financing for fix-and-flip projects with fast closing timelines
Landlords refinancing or purchasing rental properties (including short-term rentals) wanting DSCR loan qualification without W2 income
Developers and builders needing ground-up construction financing with interest-as-disbursed structures and quick approval
Experienced investors who have been rejected by traditional lenders but have strong deal fundamentals and equity position
diagnosis: BEST Lending Co is a specialized private lender for real estate investors, not a consumer finance company. It is best suited for experienced fix-and-flip investors, landlords, and developers who need fast, flexible short-term or investment-focused financing and have properties with strong equity and deal fundamentals. The critical caveat is that rates are substantially higher than conventional mortgages (making this appropriate only for short-term hold periods or cash-flowing rentals) and the company does not serve borrowers seeking primary residence mortgages or general consumer lending.
services: Fix-N-Flip bridge loans (up to 90% purchase + 100% rehab, 9.50% starting rate, 5-day close)
DSCR loans for rental property purchase and refinance (up to 80% LTV, 6.50% starting rate, 30-year fixed, 15-day close)
Short-term rental (STR) financing through DSCR program
Construction loans for ground-up development (up to 85% LTC, 9.99% starting rate, 10-day close)
100% online application platform with real-time status tracking
Electronic signature and paperless closing process
Instant quote generation and preliminary approval
Document upload and verification via secure portal
Loan closing and funding coordination (3+ days after full package)
Commercial real estate financing for investment properties
Proprietary technology for expedited underwriting and loan decisions
Partnership coordination with title companies and industry professionals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 10505 Sorrento Valley Rd UNIT 125, San Diego, CA 92121
